name: A cobblestone road
description:
You walk along a cobbled road.  As you do, you notice it is getting bumpier and
less even.  Tents have been erected along both sides of the road.  Most of them
are showing wear, and even a few rips.  You have heard rumours that Dale's
defenses are breaking down and orc scouts have been spotted inside the walls.
To your north is the defensive wall that protects you and the citizens of Dale
from the brunt of the war.
